subcodes.first_line: O ye two wayfarers of the wilderness! Render thanks unto God that ye are intoxicated with the chalice of His Covenant, and in field and desert [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بادیه پیما حمد کنید خدا را که سرمست پیمانه پیمانید و در دشت و صحرا و
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
